alt: Conservation ranger holding fluffy young kakapo chicks during a health check
caption: Kakapo chicks hatch as vulnerable, fluffy white balls of down and require dedicated maternal and conservation care.
acquisitionNotes: High-quality baby image demonstrating conservation hand-rearing efforts. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/b/b7/Stephen_Bragg_with_kakapo_chicks.jpg
attributionText: Photo by Alastair Morrison/Department of Conservation via Wikimedia Commons, CC BY 2.0
